stages.concept:
# Unit 155: 혼합가정법 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **혼합가정법**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> If I **had studied** harder, I **would be** a doctor now.
> 더 열심히 공부했더라면, 지금 의사일 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 혼합가정법은 **If절은 과거완료**, **주절은 과거**를 써요. 과거의 일이 현재에 영향을 미치는 경우!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 형태: **If + 주어 + had p.p. ~, 주어 + would/could + 동사원형 ~**

> If I **had saved** money, I **could buy** a car now.
> 돈을 모았더라면, 지금 차를 살 수 있을 텐데.
> (과거: 돈을 안 모음 → 현재: 차를 못 삼)

> If she **had not missed** the flight, she **would be** here now.
> 비행기를 놓치지 않았더라면, 지금 여기 있을 텐데.
> (과거: 비행기를 놓침 → 현재: 여기 없음)

> If I **had married** him, I **would be** happier now.
> 그와 결혼했더라면, 지금 더 행복할 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 비교!

| | If절 | 주절 |
|------|------|------|
| 가정법 과거 | 과거동사 (현재 반대) | would + 동사원형 |
| 가정법 과거완료 | had p.p. (과거 반대) | would have p.p. |
| **혼합가정법** | **had p.p. (과거 반대)** | **would + 동사원형 (현재 결과)** |

**Q. 다음 괄호 안에서 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"If he had taken my advice then, he ( would be / would have been ) rich now."
1. would be ✅
2. would have been

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! If절에는 '그 당시에(then)' 일어난 과거 사실의 반대인 'had taken'이 쓰였고, 주절에는 '지금(now)'의 결과를 가정하고 있으므로 혼합가정법의 형태인 'would be(조동사 과거형 + 동사원형)'가 와야 합니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 혼합가정법은 과거 원인 + 현재 결과! If절은 과거완료, 주절은 현재! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 155: 혼합가정법 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I missed my flight, so I am not in Korea.
→ If I hadn't missed my flight, I (     ) in Korea now.
> **정답** would be

---

**02.** She didn't study, so she doesn't know the answer.
→ If she had studied, she (     ) the answer now.
> **정답** would know

---

**03.** He didn't save money, so he can't buy a car.
→ If he had saved money, he (     ) a car now.
> **정답** could buy

---

**04.** I didn't eat breakfast, so I am hungry now.
→ If I had eaten breakfast, I (     ) hungry now.
> **정답** wouldn't be

---

**05.** She didn't take the medicine, so she is still sick.
→ If she had taken the medicine, she (     ) sick now.
> **정답** wouldn't be

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If I had studied harder, I would have known the answer now.
(혼합가정법: 과거 조건 → 현재 결과)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** would have known → would know

---

**07.** If he had saved money, he could have bought a car now.
(혼합가정법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** could have bought → could buy

---

**08.** If I hadn't missed the bus, I would have been here now.
(혼합가정법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** would have been → would be

---

**09.** If she had eaten breakfast, she wouldn't have been hungry now.
(혼합가정법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wouldn't have been → wouldn't be

---

**10.** If he hadn't broken his leg, he could have played soccer now.
(혼합가정법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** could have played → could play

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
비행기를 놓치지 않았다면 지금 한국에 있을 텐데.
If I my flight, I in Korea now.
> **정답** hadn't missed, would be

---

**12.** 공부했더라면 지금 답을 알 텐데.
If she , she the answer now.
> **정답** had studied, would know

---

**13.** 돈을 모았더라면 지금 차를 살 수 있을 텐데.
If he money, he a car now.
> **정답** had saved, could buy

---

**14.** 아침을 먹었더라면 지금 배고프지 않을 텐데.
If I breakfast, I hungry now.
> **정답** had eaten, wouldn't be

---

**15.** 약을 먹었더라면 지금 아프지 않을 텐데.
If she the medicine, she sick now.
> **정답** had taken, wouldn't be

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
공부했더라면 지금 답을 알 텐데.
If had she studied she would know the answer now
> **정답** If / she / had / studied / she / would / know / the / answer / now

---

**17.** 버스를 놓치지 않았다면 지금 여기 있을 텐데.
If hadn't I missed the bus would I be here now
> **정답** If / I / hadn't / missed / the / bus / I / would / be / here / now

---

**18.** 돈을 모았더라면 지금 여행할 수 있을 텐데.
If had he saved money could he travel now
> **정답** If / he / had / saved / money / he / could / travel / now

---

**19.** 아침을 먹었더라면 지금 배고프지 않을 텐데.
If had I eaten breakfast wouldn't I be hungry now
> **정답** If / I / had / eaten / breakfast / I / wouldn't / be / hungry / now

---

**20.** 다리를 다치지 않았다면 지금 축구를 할 수 있을 텐데.
If hadn't he broken his leg could he play soccer now
> **정답** If / he / hadn't / broken / his / leg / he / could / play / soccer / now
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 155: 혼합가정법 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If you had studied hard, you _____________________
high grades now.
would have got
got
get
would get
> **정답** would get

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If he hadn't cheated on the exam, he
________________________ in a big trouble now.
wouldn't be
were
would be
wouldn't have been
> **정답** wouldn't be

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If she had passed the test, we
________________________ a big party now.
would hold
held
would have held
had held
> **정답** would hold

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If you _________________________ late last night,
you would be sleepy now.
would have stayed
stayed
have stayed
had stayed
> **정답** had stayed

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If John ________________________ the plane
yesterday, he would be in Korea now.
caught
would have caught
has caught
had caught
> **정답** had caught

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As I spent all my money, I can't buy the bag.
If I hadn't spent all my money, I could buy the
bag.
If I didn't spend all my money, I could buy the
bag.
If I spent all my money, I can't buy the bag.
If I had spent all my money, I could buy the
bag.
> **정답** If I hadn't spent all my money, I could buy the bag.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As my brother broke my computer, I can't play
computer games.
If my brother didn't break my computer, I
can't play computer games.
If my brother had broken my computer, I
could play computer games.
If my brother hadn't broken my computer, I
could play computer games.
If my brother broke my computer, I could play
computer games.
> **정답** If my brother hadn't broken my computer, I could play computer games.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As my son didn't keep his promise, I'm disappointed.
If my son had kept his promise, I would be
disappointed.
If my son keeps his promise, I'm disappointed.
If my son had kept his promise, I wouldn't be
disappointed.
If my son hadn't kept his promise, I wouldn't
be disappointed.
> **정답** If my son had kept his promise, I wouldn't be disappointed.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If he had saved his money, he could buy the luxurious
car now.
As he didn't save his money, he can buy the
luxurious car now.
As he didn't save his money, he can't buy the
luxurious car now.
As he had saved his money, he couldn't buy
the luxurious car now.
As he saved his money, he can buy the
luxurious car now.
> **정답** As he didn't save his money, he can't buy the luxurious car now.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As you didn't study the lesson, you can't answer my
question.
If you had studied the lesson, you could
answer my question.
If you had studied the lesson, you can answer
my question.
If you studied the lesson, you can answer my
question.
If you hadn't studied the lesson, you could
answer my question.
> **정답** If you had studied the lesson, you could answer my question.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If he had worked hard when he was young, he
could have been a rich man now.
If he hadn't won the lottery yesterday, he
wouldn't feel excited today.
If it hadn't rained yesterday, the road
wouldn't be muddy today.
If he hadn't posted bad images on the
Internet, he wouldn't be in trouble.
> **정답** If he had worked hard when he was young, he could have been a rich man now.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If I had driven carefully, I wouldn't have been
in the hospital now.
If I had walked faster, I could catch the bus.
If you hadn't helped me then, I would be in a
big trouble now.
If I had taken the medicine last night, I would
be fine now.
> **정답** If I had driven carefully, I wouldn't have been in the hospital now.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If John had spent more time on studying, he
would be a lawyer now.
If it hadn't rained, we could have played
soccer with your team last Saturday.
If Maria had brought an umbrella this
morning, she wouldn't have gotten wet now.
If he hadn't refused my offer, he would be
successful now.
> **정답** If Maria had brought an umbrella this morning, she wouldn't have gotten wet now.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If my computer had not broken, I could use it
now.
If he had majored in computer science, he
would have been an IT expert now.
If they had arrived here on time, they could
have entered the show.
If she had told him the truth, he wouldn't have
been angry.
> **정답** If he had majored in computer science, he would have been an IT expert now.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If I hadn't eaten the sandwich, I would be
hungry now.
If you hadn't helped me, I wouldn't have
succeeded in it.
If he hadn't eaten so much, he would not be
overweight now.
If we had left thirty minutes ago, we would
have been there now.
> **정답** If we had left thirty minutes ago, we would have been there now.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그 때 그가 약속을 지켰더라면 지금 내가 그를 신뢰할 수 있을
텐데
If he kept his promise then, I could trust him
now.
If he had kept promise then, I could have
trusted him now.
If he had kept his promise then, I couldn't
trust him now.
If he had kept his promise then, I could trust
him now.
> **정답** If he had kept his promise then, I could trust him now.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 영어를 열심히 공부했더라면, 지금 외국인들과 대화를 할
수 있을 텐데
If I studied English hard, I could talk with
foreigners now.
If I had studied English hard, I could have
talked with foreigners now.
If I had studied English hard, I could talk with
foreigners now.
If I studied English hard, I could have talked
with foreigners now.
> **정답** If I had studied English hard, I could talk with foreigners now.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
네가 그때 그의 프로젝트를 도와주지 않았다면, 그는 지금 큰
곤경에 처해 있을 텐데
If you had helped with his project then, he
would be in a big trouble now.
If you didn't help with his project then, he is in
a big trouble now.
If you helped with his project then, he would
be in a big trouble now.
If you hadn't helped with his project then, he
would be in a big trouble now.
> **정답** If you hadn't helped with his project then, he would be in a big trouble now.

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
어제밤에 눈이 내리지 않았다면 지금 그렇게 많은 사고가
나지는 않을 텐데
If it hadn't snowed last night, there would be
so many accidents now.
If it snowed last night, there would be so
many accidents now.
If it hadn't snowed last night, there wouldn't
be so many accidents now.
If it didn't snow last night, there would be so
many accidents now.
> **정답** If it hadn't snowed last night, there wouldn't be so many accidents now.

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
네가 어젯밤에 숙제를 마쳤더라면, 지금 밖에서 놀 수 있을
텐데
If you did your homework last night, you
could play outside now.
If you had done your homework last night,
you could play outside now.
If you had done your homework last night,
you could have played outside now.
If you had done your homework last night,
you couldn't play outside now.
> **정답** If you had done your homework last night, you could play outside now.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 155 혼합가정법중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
As I didn't take the plane yesterday, I am not in
Chicago now.
→ If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
yesterday, I would be in Chicago now.
정답 I, had, taken, the, plane

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
As she bought the expensive dress then, she can't
buy the books now.
→ If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) , she could buy the books now.
정답 she, had, not, bought, the, expensive, dress

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
As he didn't catch the train, he isn't here now.
→ If he  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he 
  (     )  now.
정답 had, caught, the, train, would, be, here

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
As I didn't book a ticket last week, I can't go to the
concert now.
→ If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  last
week, I  (     )   (     )  in the concert now.
정답 I, had, booked, a, ticket, could, go

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 말을 사용하여 가정법 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 돈을 낭비하지 않았더라면, 지금 그 가방을 살 수 있을
텐데.
힌트 (     ) waste, money, can, buy, the bag
If I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I  (     )  
  (     )  now.
정답 had, not, wasted, money, could, buy, the, bag

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 말을 사용하여 가정법 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 그 주식에 투자했었다면, 지금 나는 부자일 텐데.
힌트 (     ) invest, will, be, rich
If I  (     )   (     )  in the stocks, I  (     )  
 now.
정답 had, invested, would, be, rich

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 말을 사용하여 가정법 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 그의 지원서를 제출 했었다면, 지금 여기에서 일할 수
있을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) submit, his, application, can, work
If he  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he 
 here now.
정답 had, submitted, his, application, could, work

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 말을 사용하여 가정법 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 그 일을 어제 끝냈었다면, 지금 우리하고 축구를 할 수
있었을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) finish, the work, can, play, soccer
If he  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  yesterday, he
  (     )   (     )  with us now.
정답 had, finished, the, work, could, play, soccer

---

**09.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
If we received our visas last week, we would be on
the plane now.
→ If we  (     )  last week,
we would be on the plane now.
정답 had received our visas

---

**10.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
If I had been injured in the last game, I can not
play in the game now.
→ If I had been injured in the last game, I
 in the game now.
정답 could not play

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 155: 혼합가정법 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If you had practiced hard, you _____________________ a great player now.
would have become became become would become
> 정답: would become

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If she hadn't lied on her resume, she ________________________ in a big trouble now.
wouldn't be were would be wouldn't have been
> 정답: wouldn't be

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If he had won the lottery, we ________________________ a big vacation now.
would take took would have taken had taken
> 정답: would take

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If you _________________________ up early yesterday, you would be tired now.
would have stayed stayed have stayed had stayed
> 정답: had stayed

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If Amy ________________________ the bus yesterday, she would be in Seoul now.
caught would have caught has caught had caught
> 정답: had caught

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As I used all my savings, I can't buy the shoes.
